description: Transform screenshots into searchable notes using AI vision and text analysis.

manifest.name: Vision Recall

name: Vision Recall

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Updates

### Customizable prompt support 🥳🤗

> Enhance configuration options
> 
> - Introduced new configuration options for vision and notes LLM prompts
> - Added category detection feature toggle in ConfigModal
> - Updated ScreenshotProcessor to utilize new prompt configurations
> - Cleaned up HelpModal by removing outdated forum links

If you notice a difference in your notes and do not like the change, it may be because the categorization functionality is now disabled by default. To re-enable it, open `Advanced configuration` by pressing the `Config` button and checking the `Enable category detection` box.

If you have any issues or need to discuss something, please [join the community on Discord](https://visionrecall.com/discord)!

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/travisvn/obsidian-vision-recall/compare/1.1.0...1.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Updates

### 🗺️ Multilingual Support! 🌏🎉
Implement language support features

- Added language support functionality, including validation
- Introduced new language-related utility functions in languages.ts
- Enhanced OCR validation to consider expected language
- Updated settings page to allow users to select a language for OCR and LLM processing
- Integrated language settings into tag generation and note creation processes

The language can be set in the Obsidian plugin settings and is currently labeled as "experimental"

I've tested it in French & Japanese with success. Keep in mind that your LLM must be capable of handling the language, obviously. 

If you have any issues or need to discuss something, please [join the community on Discord](https://visionrecall.com/discord)!

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/travisvn/obsidian-vision-recall/compare/1.0.14...1.1.0

### Updates 

#### Add LM Studio documentation and UI improvements

- Added comprehensive LM Studio setup documentation
- Updated DocViewerModal to support new LM Studio documentation
- Improved accessibility labels and wording in SelectImagesModal and TagCombobox
- Commented out minimized progress display option in ConfigModal (currently not in use but may be in future)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Version 1.0.11

#### Updates:

- Removed vault root folder intake settings and related functionality
  - Realized it wasn't a workable setup, so there's a new feature for selecting images from any folder (default as vault root) to be processed 🙂
- Introduced `HelperService` for retrieving folders and images
- Added `SelectImagesModal` for interactive image selection from vault folders
- Updated `MainViewHeader` to use the new helper service
- Simplified image intake logic in the main plugin file
- Added new styles for the select images modal

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/travisvn/obsidian-vision-recall/compare/1.0.10...1.0.11

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Add vault root folder intake functionality

- Introduced new settings for intake from vault root folder
- Added support for processing images based on filename terms (this only applies to the vault root folder)
- Updated screenshot processor to handle vault root folder intake
- Expanded image extension constants
- Added new UI button for vault root folder intake
- Updated settings page with new configuration options

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/travisvn/obsidian-vision-recall/compare/1.0.8...1.0.10

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Vision Recall for Obsidian – v1.0.7 🎉  

This release brings improvements to plugin configuration, documentation, and UI styling, along with a new tag service for better organization.  

#### 🔧 Improvements & Fixes  
- 📖 **Updated documentation**:  
  - Corrected Ollama setup guide with the proper API base URL  
  - Added a note about free text & image LLMs available on OpenRouter  
- 🏷️ **New tag service**: Improved tag generation for better categorization  
- 🖼️ **UI enhancements**:  
  - Refined screenshot modal styling  
  - Minor tweaks to configuration and interface for a smoother experience  
- ⬆️ **Version bump to 1.0.7**  

As always, feedback is welcome! 🚀

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/travisvn/obsidian-vision-recall/compare/1.0.6...1.0.7

releases.description:

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Implementing all recommendations per PR comments — https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/5330#issuecomment-2684011991

### Updates
Refactor and modernize project structure and styling
- Migrated CSS files to SCSS with more modular and scoped styling
- Added new DeleteConfirmationModal for consistent deletion UX
- Updated file and folder handling to use Obsidian's native methods
- Improved local storage interactions through Obsidian app methods
- Bumped version to 1.0.4 and updated minimum app version
- Added new path alias and TypeScript configuration updates

And all other points outlined in the PR review

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/travisvn/obsidian-vision-recall/compare/1.0.3...1.0.4

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Version 1.0.3 ✨

#### What's New:
- 🛠️ **Code Organization**: The codebase has been better organized for improved maintainability.
- 🎨 **UI Update**: Switched the UI from Title Case to Sentence case to conform to the Obsidian plugin guidelines.

[Full Changelog](https://github.com/travisvn/obsidian-vision-recall/compare/1.0.2...1.0.3)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Version 1.0.1 🎉

Excited to announce the release of version 1.0.1 of the Obsidian Vision Recall plugin! This update brings significant improvements in plugin organization and functionality.

#### What's New:
- 🚀 Major revamp and organizational enhancements
- 🔄 Improved handling of plugin onload functions
- 💾 Enhanced loading and saving data processes

In addition to these core improvements, various bug fixes and performance optimizations ensure a smoother user experience. Feedback has been invaluable in guiding these updates, and continued support is appreciated.

[Full Changelog](https://github.com/travisvn/obsidian-vision-recall/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1)
